title: astragalus reinii
intro: Astragalus reinii, also known as Huang Qi or Chinese Milk Vetch, is a perennial legume native to China and other parts of East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, and has been traditionally used to enhance the body's resistance to disease and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Astragalus reinii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus reinii is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote vitality and longevity.
